thingsToDo: Use Venice Beach for a walkable waterfront block with time for views, food, or an easier sightseeing pace.
Pair Venice Beach with one nearby district or attraction instead of treating the waterfront as the whole day.
Plan time for a short sightseeing loop and nearby photo stops instead of only passing through.
planningTips: Plan Venice Beach as part of a wider neighborhood or city block instead of making it the only stop in that part of the day.
